gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/515)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/515)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ لَمْ يُبْرِئْهُ الْحَمْدُ لَمْ يُبْرِئْهُ شَيْ‏ءٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bn Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Salma Bin Muhriz who said,
‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The one whom (Surah) Al-Hamd (Chapter 1) does not cure, nothing would cure him’.
en.sarwar: 22. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Salmah ibn Muhriz who has said the following: “I heard abu Ja’far (a.s.) saying, ‘If al-Hamd, (the first Chapter of the Holy Quran) would not cure one, nothing else could cure one.’”
